title: Clarify zone and subgraph authoring semantics
description: Document when AI authors should use exclusive zones versus intersecting structural subgraphs.
decision_notes: Sibling zones represent exclusive placement or ownership regions and must not intersect.
Nested parent-child zones overlap intentionally by containment.
Subgraphs express structural or authoring groups and may intersect.
When overlap would create placement or ownership ambiguity, authors must use zones.
verification: docs/AI_AUTHORING_GUIDE.md concept table and dedicated Zone vs Subgraph section
README links the guide and package.json includes it in the published package
